headline: HRS 2026: Medtronic, Boston Scientific and Abbott debut key PFA data
summary: New data on the pulsed-field ablation (PFA) device class debuts at HRS 2026 as the field catches the eye of several large medtech companies.

headline: Medtronic: Expectations Are Low And That's The Opportunity
summary: Medtronic is rated a Buy, seeing limited downside and gradual upside from consistent execution and incremental margin gains. Read more on MDT stock here.

headline: Abbott's Strong AFib, Cardiac Device Data Fuels Heart-Rhythm Device Buzz
summary: Abbott shares rise as new trial data show strong safety and efficacy in AFib treatment and cardiac pacing technologies.

headline: BTIG Reiterates Buy on Abbott Laboratories, Maintains $131 Price Target
summary: BTIG  analyst Marie Thibault   reiterates Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) with a Buy and maintains $131 price target.
